children.text: the individual is eligible for vocational rehabilitation services under subchapter I;
the individual is determined to be an individual with a most significant disability;

for purposes of activities carried out with funds described in , the individual is a youth with a disability, as defined in ; andsection 795h(d) of this titlesection 705(42) of this title1See References in Text note below.1

a comprehensive assessment of the rehabilitation needs of the individual described in , including an evaluation of rehabilitation, career, and job needs, identifies supported employment as the appropriate employment outcome for the individual.section 705(2)(B) of this title
